title: Phyllorkis roxburghii
taxonomy: Phyllorkis roxburghii is classified within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Phyllorkis, which is part of the subtribe Malaxideae. The subtribe Malaxideae is further classified under the tribe Malaxideae within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants known as orchids. Phyllorkis roxburghii's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and adaptations within the orchid family.

It is said to possess antidiarrheal, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.
